mapper.select: select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, tsr.owner_id, trdl.id as link_id, trdl.valid_from, trdl.expire_on, trdl.status, trdl.app_id from t_sys_role tsr join t_role_dept_link trdl on tsr.role_id = trdl.role_id and trdl.is_deleted = 0 and tsr.app_id = trdl.app_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, case when trdl.dept_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_role tsr left join t_role_dept_link trdl on tsr.role_id = trdl.role_id and trdl.is_deleted = 0 and tsr.app_id = trdl.app_id and trdl.dept_id = #{deptId} where tsr.is_deleted = 0
